fluxBand.label: Synthetic data · Series B
fluxBand.title: Train models on data that never existed

bands.title: Generative data engine
bands.description: Diffusion and GAN pipelines synthesize photorealistic training samples — balancing class distribution, edge cases, and demographic parity without touching raw PII.
bands.alt: Generative AI creating synthetic training data samples

bands.title: Autonomous labeling mesh
bands.description: Weak supervision and active learning loops auto-annotate synthetic datasets — human reviewers only adjudicate low-confidence edges, cutting labeling cost by 90%.
bands.alt: Automated data labeling dashboard with confidence scores

bands.title: Privacy-preserving synthesis
bands.description: Differential privacy budgets and k-anonymity guarantees ensure synthetic records carry zero re-identification risk — passing GDPR, HIPAA, and SOC 2 audits by design.
bands.alt: Privacy shield protecting synthetic patient records

bands.title: Domain adaptation studio
bands.description: Style transfer and feature alignment bridge the sim-to-real gap — fine-tuning vision models on synthetic pre-training that transfers to live camera feeds with minimal real data.
bands.alt: Domain adaptation between simulated and real-world imagery

bands.title: Quality scoring radar
bands.description: FID, precision-recall curves, and downstream task benchmarks score every synthetic batch — rejecting drifted generations before they pollute production training runs.
bands.alt: Quality metrics radar chart for synthetic data batches

bands.title: Fleet orchestration layer
bands.description: Kubernetes-native job schedulers spin up GPU clusters on demand — orchestrating generation, labeling, and validation pipelines across multi-cloud with spot-instance cost optimization.
bands.alt: Cloud GPU cluster orchestrating synthetic data pipelines
